originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Replacing Cython Bindings with Python C API and Reviewing Multi-Map Support for Driving Environment
summary: Explored using the Python C API to replace Cython bindings in PufferLib, successfully creating a general-purpose wrapper that reduces per-environment binding code. Also reviewed code for the driving environment (GPU Drive) with a collaborator, focusing on multi-map initialization and observation size fixes.
